summary: Experienced Software Engineer specializing in microservices architecture, REST API development, MongoDB database design, automation frameworks, cloud deployment (GCP & Azure), CI/CD implementation, and code quality governance using SonarQube.

highlights: Designed and implemented microservices-based backend systems.
Developed scalable REST APIs using Python (FastAPI).
Built and optimized MongoDB queries, scripts, and data models.
Implemented authentication and authorization mechanisms for secure APIs.
Deployed and maintained cloud applications on GCP and Azure.
Managed CI/CD pipelines and version control using GitHub and Bitbucket.
Improved system performance through API optimization and database tuning.
Built automation tools and AI-powered workflows using modern AI frameworks and APIs.
Implemented LLM-based solutions for internal tools and automation.
Implemented data pipelines and preprocessing scripts for AI/ML model consumption.
Researched emerging AI technologies such as MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI agents.
Produced thorough, accurate test documentation including test plans and scripts.
Maintained and created product knowledge documentation for use within the test team.
Assisted with functional queries arising from business users following software release.
Designed product-changing software improvements based on test run results and client feedback.
Analysed test results to determine accuracy, durability and efficiency of software.
Reported testing progress to line management, communicating effectively and escalating where appropriate.
Prioritised bugs through focused data collection and analysis, driving continual innovation.
Defined and maintained automation testing for various software applications.

projects.name: MongoDB MCP Server
projects.description: REST-based MCP server with MongoDB integration.
